summary: Single Team subscriber National Feed archive - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN the us is a Single Team Subscriber
AND the subscribed-to-team is in the game
AND the game mediaFeedType = NATIONAL
AND the game mediaState = MEDIA_ARCHIVE

**NOTE:** National TV game = Fox Saturday Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the archived game tile
steps.result:
THEN buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the game feed
AND the user will see a feed button for the home team
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button
